completed_features.description: User can organize notes into folders
completed_features.notes: Full folder CRUD: create via sidebar + button, rename via dropdown menu, delete with confirmation dialog. Notes can be moved between folders via editor toolbar dropdown. Sidebar shows folders section with folder links for filtering.
Cmd/Ctrl+N creates new note (global shortcut in notes layout). Cmd/Ctrl+S saves immediately. Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P toggles preview. All shortcuts work in the editor.

completed_features.description: Export a note as a plain .md file
completed_features.notes: Download button in editor toolbar exports note as .md file with title as H1 header followed by body content.
Toolbar below editor toolbar with Bold, Italic, Heading, Link, Code, and List buttons. Each inserts correct markdown syntax at cursor position or wraps selection.

done_conditions.description: User can create a new folder and see it in the sidebar
done_conditions.notes: Plus button in sidebar Folders section opens create dialog. New folder appears immediately in sidebar after creation.

done_conditions.description: User can rename and delete a folder
done_conditions.notes: Three-dot menu on each folder in sidebar provides Rename and Delete options. Rename opens dialog with current name pre-filled. Delete shows AlertDialog confirmation.

done_conditions.description: User can move a note into a folder and see it listed under that folder
done_conditions.notes: Folder icon button in editor toolbar opens dropdown with all folders. Selecting a folder moves the note. Clicking folder in sidebar filters to show only notes in that folder.

done_conditions.description: Deleting a folder moves its notes to the root level (not to trash)
done_conditions.notes: Delete folder action explicitly sets folderId to null for all notes in the folder before deleting. Also backed by ON DELETE SET NULL in schema. Confirmation dialog explains this behavior.

done_conditions.description: User can export a note as a .md file
done_conditions.notes: Download icon button in editor toolbar triggers browser download of .md file. File contains title as H1 heading followed by note body.

done_conditions.description: Markdown toolbar buttons insert correct formatting syntax
done_conditions.notes: Six toolbar buttons: Bold (**text**), Italic (*text*), Heading (## ), Link ([text](url)), Code (`code`), List (- ). Wraps selection or inserts placeholder. Cursor positioned for immediate editing.

done_conditions.description: Web keyboard shortcuts work: Cmd/Ctrl+N creates a new note, Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P toggles preview
done_conditions.notes: KeyboardShortcuts component mounted in notes layout handles Cmd/Ctrl+N globally. Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P handled in NoteEditor component. Cmd/Ctrl+S for immediate save also works.

done_conditions.description: iOS swipe gestures work: swipe to pin, swipe to delete
done_conditions.notes: iOS-only done condition, not applicable to web platform.

routes_or_screens.description: Landing/marketing page with hero section and CTA buttons
Notes list with search, sort, new note. Header shows 'All Notes', 'Favorites', or folder name.
Filtered view showing only favorited notes
Filtered view showing notes in a specific folder
Note editor with markdown toolbar, preview toggle, folder move, export, pin/favorite/delete
Trash view with restore and permanent delete
Settings page with theme toggle and account info

how_to_run.web: cd web && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev

known_issues: Sessions are stored in-memory (Map) — they won't persist across server restarts. Acceptable for local dev with SQLite.
Node.js >= 20.9.0 is required (Next.js 16 requirement). Use 'nvm use 22' if available.
self_eval_notes: Build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors. All 7 web-applicable done conditions for Sprint 3 implemented. Folder CRUD works end-to-end with sidebar integration. Markdown toolbar inserts correct syntax. Export downloads .md file. Keyboard shortcuts functional. DC-025 skipped as iOS-only.
